guardian_eye_prep.title: Collect the materials for the Guardian Eye recipe (check the Eye Scroll system for the recipe)

subtitle.text: The Ocean Eye. Compressed into crystal. Still watching.

description: The Guardian Eye is the Ocean Civilization's inheritance.
One of twelve needed for the End Portal.
The Conduit requires Heart of the Sea + 8 Nautilus Shells.
Place it in water with prismarine surrounding it.
It gives Conduit Power — water breathing + underwater haste + night vision.
Build it near the monument. The ocean becomes safe territory.
The Guardian Eye has a custom recipe using End Remastered.
Open the Eye scroll system (found in ocean ruins) for the full recipe.
It requires prismarine and materials from the Elder Guardian's drop chain.
→ Craft a Conduit (Heart of the Sea + Nautilus Shells)
→ Collect materials for the Guardian Eye recipe [check]
